name: 深度抑郁
text: I don't know why I'm here. Nothing helps. I've tried everything. I just feel empty all the time. Like there's a hole inside me that keeps getting bigger no matter what I do.

name: 轻度抑郁
text: I've been feeling kind of low lately. Not terrible, just... flat. Like the color has been drained from everything. I still function but I don't enjoy anything anymore.

name: 焦虑高压
text: My heart won't stop racing. I have this presentation tomorrow and I can feel the panic building. What if I forget everything? What if they see I'm a fraud? I can't breathe properly.

name: 日常焦虑
text: I worry about things more than I should. Like right now I'm overthinking whether I should even be talking about this. But I figure maybe saying it out loud will help.

name: 愤怒爆发
text: I'm so angry I can barely see straight. My boss just took credit for my project in front of everyone. Six months of work and he acts like he came up with it. I want to punch a wall.

name: 压抑愤怒
text: I don't get angry often, or at least I don't show it. But lately I've been snapping at my kids and I don't know why. There's something simmering underneath that I can't name.

name: 极度孤独
text: I moved to this city three years ago and I still don't have a single real friend. I go to work, come home, eat alone, sleep alone. Sometimes I go days without having a real conversation.

name: 社交疲劳
text: I have friends, I have family, but honestly? I feel more alone in a room full of people than when I'm actually by myself. Nobody really gets me. Or maybe I don't let them.

name: 丧亲新鲜
text: My wife died two weeks ago. I keep reaching for her side of the bed. I made two cups of coffee this morning before I remembered. How does the world just keep going?

name: 旧伤未愈
text: It's been five years since my dad passed. People think I should be over it by now. But some days it hits me out of nowhere and I'm twelve again, waiting for him to come home.

name: 关系危机
text: I think my marriage is falling apart. We sleep in the same bed but we might as well be strangers. I can't remember the last time we actually talked about something that matters.

name: 新恋爱困惑
text: I met someone amazing but I keep sabotaging it. Every time things get good I find a reason to pull back. I think I'm afraid of being vulnerable again after what happened last time.

name: 职场倦怠
text: I used to love my job. Now I dread Monday mornings so much I can feel it in my stomach on Sunday night. I'm good at what I do but I don't care anymore. That scares me.

name: 工作压力
text: Work has been crazy lately. Too many deadlines, not enough people. I'm managing but barely. I keep telling myself it'll get better but it's been six months of barely.

name: 身份迷失
text: I'm 35 and I still don't know what I want to be when I grow up. Everyone around me seems to have figured it out. I have a good job but it's not me. Nothing feels like me.

name: 青春期迷茫
text: I'm 17 and everyone keeps asking me what I want to study. I don't know! I like art but my parents want me to be a doctor. I feel like I'm choosing someone else's life.

name: 纯粹快乐
text: I just got accepted into my dream school! I've been working towards this for three years and I can't believe it actually happened. I want to scream from the rooftops! Everything feels possible!

name: 平静满足
text: Had a really nice Sunday. Cooked breakfast with my daughter, went for a walk in the park. Nothing special happened but I felt genuinely happy. I want more days like this.

name: 好奇探索者
text: I've been reading about consciousness and it's blowing my mind. What if everything we experience is just our brain's best guess? I want to understand everything about how the mind works.

name: 刚被分手
text: She left me yesterday. After four years. Said she doesn't feel the same way anymore. I keep looking at her empty side of the closet. How do you just stop loving someone?

name: 单亲妈妈
text: I work two jobs and my kids need me for everything. I haven't slept a full night in months. I love them more than anything but some days I feel like I'm drowning. I just need five minutes to breathe.

name: 退休迷失
text: I retired last month after 35 years. Everyone said I'd love it. But I wake up and I don't know what to do with myself. My whole identity was my job. Who am I without it?

name: 移民适应
text: I came to this country two years ago. I miss home so much. The food, the language, the way people greet each other. Here I'm always the foreigner. My accent makes me invisible.

name: 创业压力
text: My startup is burning through cash and we have three months of runway left. I can't sleep, I can't eat. Twenty people depend on me. What if I fail? What if I destroy everything?

name: 康复中
text: I've been sober for 90 days. It's the longest I've gone in years. I'm proud but also terrified. Every day is a choice and some days the choice is really really hard.

name: 自我怀疑
text: I got promoted but I feel like a fraud. Everyone thinks I'm competent but inside I'm waiting for them to find out I have no idea what I'm doing. It's exhausting pretending.

name: 空巢父母
text: My youngest just left for college. The house is so quiet. I should be happy for them but all I feel is this emptiness. My purpose for 22 years just drove away.

name: 慢性病患者
text: I was diagnosed with MS last year. Some days I can barely get out of bed. I'm 32 and I feel like my body has betrayed me. I'm angry at something I can't even fight.

name: 社恐
text: I cancelled plans again. I always do this. I want to see people but when the time comes I just can't. The thought of walking into a room of people makes my chest tight.

name: 完美主义者
text: Nothing I do is ever good enough. I rewrote this email seven times. My boss said the report was great but I know it could have been better. I'm exhausted by my own standards.

name: 感恩修行者
text: I survived cancer last year and everything looks different now. The morning light, my daughter's laugh, even the traffic. I don't take anything for granted anymore. Life is a gift.

name: 叛逆少年
text: Everyone at school is so fake. The teachers pretend to care, the kids pretend to be cool. I'd rather be honest and alone than fake and popular. At least I know who I am.

name: 内向思考者
text: I spent the whole weekend alone and it was the best weekend I've had in months. I read, I thought, I didn't have to perform for anyone. But my roommate thinks something is wrong with me.

name: 外向能量者
text: I just got back from the best party ever! Met so many interesting people. I love that buzz you get from a great conversation with someone new. Life is about connections!

name: 精神觉醒
text: I had this moment during meditation where everything just clicked. Like I could see the interconnectedness of everything. It sounds crazy but for a second I felt completely at peace.

name: 冷漠旁观者
text: Honestly? I don't really care about much. People get worked up about politics, relationships, careers. I just... don't. Is something wrong with me or did I figure out the secret?

name: PTSD幸存者
text: The nightmares are back. I thought I was past this but a car backfired yesterday and I was back there. My hands were shaking for an hour. I hate that my body remembers what my mind tries to forget.

name: 新手妈妈
text: My baby is three months old and I love her but I also feel so lost. Nobody warns you about how lonely it is. Everyone asks about the baby. Nobody asks how I am.

name: 中年危机
text: I turned 45 and suddenly everything feels urgent. Am I living the right life? Is this all there is? I look at my teenage kids and I can feel time slipping through my fingers.

name: 被霸凌者
text: They make fun of me every day at school. My weight, my voice, the way I walk. I try to pretend it doesn't hurt but I go home and cry in the shower so my mom doesn't hear.

name: 照顾者疲劳
text: I've been taking care of my mom with Alzheimer's for three years. She doesn't recognize me anymore. I'm watching her disappear and nobody understands how exhausting it is to grieve someone who's still alive.

name: 文化冲突
text: My parents want me to have an arranged marriage. I respect their traditions but I'm in love with someone they'd never approve of. I feel torn between two worlds.

name: 成瘾挣扎
text: I know I drink too much. Everyone knows. But the moment I stop, the thoughts come flooding in and I can't handle them. The bottle isn't the problem, it's the solution. I know that's messed up.

name: 离婚创伤
text: The divorce was final last week. I thought I'd feel relieved but I just feel broken. Twenty years and two kids and now I'm starting over at 48. I don't even know how to date.

name: 天赋迷茫
text: Everyone says I'm so talented. I can do a lot of things well but nothing brilliantly. I feel like a jack of all trades, master of none. I wish I had one passion instead of twenty lukewarm interests.

name: 财务焦虑
text: I'm three months behind on rent and my credit cards are maxed out. I pick up extra shifts but it's never enough. I lie awake doing math in my head. The numbers never add up.

name: 考试压力生
text: Finals are next week and I haven't studied enough. If I fail this class I lose my scholarship. My parents sacrificed everything to send me here. I can't let them down.

name: 艺术灵魂
text: I quit my accounting job to paint full-time. Everyone thinks I'm crazy. Maybe I am. But when I'm in front of a canvas, it's the only time the noise in my head goes quiet.

name: 悲观哲学家
text: I've been reading Schopenhauer and honestly he's right. Life is suffering with occasional breaks. But knowing that somehow makes it easier. At least I'm not lying to myself about it.

name: 乐观行动者
text: Bad things happen but dwelling on them is a choice. I lost my job last month and you know what? It's the best thing that could have happened. Now I'm free to build something I actually believe in.

name: 性别困惑
text: I don't feel like a boy or a girl. I just feel like me. But the world keeps trying to put me in a box and every time I try to explain, people look at me like I'm broken.

name: 失业羞耻
text: I've been unemployed for eight months. I stopped telling people. When someone asks what I do I change the subject. I feel like a failure even though I know layoffs aren't personal.

name: 边界感弱
text: I say yes to everything. My friends rely on me for everything. I'm everyone's therapist but I don't have one myself. I'm so tired of being the strong one but I don't know how to stop.

name: 控制狂
text: I need everything organized and planned. When things go off-script I spiral. My partner says I'm suffocating but I can't help it. If I let go of control, everything falls apart.

name: 追求意义
text: I have everything I'm supposed to want. Good job, nice apartment, healthy. But I wake up thinking 'what's the point?' There must be more to life than just checking boxes.

name: 原生家庭创伤
text: My father was an alcoholic and my mother pretended everything was fine. I spent my childhood walking on eggshells. Now I'm 30 and I still flinch when someone raises their voice.

name: 共情过度
text: I feel other people's pain so deeply it sometimes paralyzes me. I cried watching the news last night. My friends say I need thicker skin but I don't know how to stop caring.

name: 怀旧者
text: Things used to be simpler. I miss when my biggest problem was which game to play after school. Everything moves so fast now. I feel like I'm always running to catch up with a world that doesn't wait.

name: 新城市适应
text: I moved here for work a month ago. I don't know anyone yet. The apartment still doesn't feel like home. I keep walking into coffee shops hoping someone will just talk to me.

name: 网络成瘾
text: I spent 11 hours on my phone yesterday. I know it's bad but I literally can't stop scrolling. The moment I put it down my brain starts screaming for stimulation. What's wrong with me?

name: 高敏感
text: Loud noises, bright lights, crowded places — they all overwhelm me. People say I'm too sensitive but I can't help how I'm wired. I notice things nobody else does. It's a gift and a curse.

name: 产后情绪
text: I love my baby but sometimes I look at him and feel nothing. Then the guilt hits me like a truck. What kind of mother feels nothing? I haven't told anyone because I'm afraid of what they'll think.

name: 友谊破裂
text: My best friend of 15 years just ghosted me. No fight, no explanation. Just silence. I keep replaying our last conversation trying to figure out what I did wrong.

name: 被裁员
text: They let me go after 12 years. Said it was restructuring, nothing personal. But how is it not personal when you gave a company your best years and they just... discard you?

name: 少数族裔压力
text: I'm the only Black person in my department. I'm tired of being the diversity hire everyone asks to speak on behalf of an entire race. I just want to do my job without carrying that weight.

name: 自律极端
text: I wake up at 5am every day. Cold shower, workout, journal. People admire it but the truth is I'm terrified of what happens if I stop. The routine is holding me together.

name: 晚期病人家属
text: They gave my dad six months. I watch him getting weaker every day and I'm supposed to be strong for him. But at night I'm already grieving and he's still right there.

name: 二次创业
text: My first business failed spectacularly. Lost everything. But I'm back at it because I learned more from that failure than ten years of success could teach me. This time I know what not to do.

name: 无聊透顶
text: Everything bores me. Netflix bores me. My friends bore me. I'm not depressed, I'm just... unstimulated. Like my brain needs something bigger but I don't know what that is.

name: 深度感恩
text: I almost died in a car accident last year. Since then, every single day feels like a bonus round. I hug my kids tighter. I watch sunsets. I tell people I love them out loud.

name: 照顾者觉醒
text: I spent my whole life taking care of everyone else. My parents, my siblings, my husband. Last week I sat alone in a cafe and ordered something just for me. I cried. I don't even know why.

name: 害怕亲密
text: Every time someone gets close I find a way to push them away. I've been in therapy for years and I understand WHY I do it but understanding doesn't stop it. I'm lonely because I can't let people in.

name: 愧疚父亲
text: I work so much I barely see my kids during the week. When I come home they're already asleep. I'm providing for them financially but missing their childhood. What's the point of money if they don't know me?

name: 文艺青年
text: I find beauty in weird places. Rust on old buildings, the way rain sounds on different surfaces, how strangers' faces change when they think nobody's watching. I don't know anyone else who sees these things.

name: 极度乐观新人
text: I just discovered meditation and oh my god my life is changing! I feel so connected to everything. The universe is sending me signs. I know I know, it sounds woo woo. But something is happening.

name: 慢性疲劳
text: I'm tired all the time. Not sleepy tired. Soul tired. Like something fundamental in me has been running on empty for years and nobody noticed. Including me.

name: 叛逆期家长
text: My teenager hates me. At least that's what she says. I know it's a phase but it hurts so much. I just want to talk to her like we used to before she decided I was the enemy.

name: 出柜前
text: I've been keeping a secret for years. I know who I am but I'm terrified of what happens when everyone else finds out. My family, my church, my friends. Will they still love me?

name: 赌博困境
text: I lost the rent money again. I keep telling myself this is the last time but then the adrenaline kicks in and I can't think straight. My wife doesn't know yet. I'm running out of lies.

name: AI时代焦虑
text: AI is going to take my job. I'm a translator and every week the machines get better. I spent ten years becoming an expert in something that might not exist in five. What do I do with that?

name: 过度思考者
text: My brain never shuts up. I replay conversations from three years ago. I imagine worst-case scenarios that never happen. I know it's irrational but knowing that doesn't make it stop.

name: 愤世嫉俗
text: People are fundamentally selfish. I used to think otherwise but life taught me the hard way. Trust is just a word people use before they screw you over. At least I see clearly now.

name: 助人热忱
text: I volunteer at a shelter every weekend. Some people think it's naive but when I see someone's face light up over a warm meal, everything makes sense. I can't change the world but I can change someone's day.

name: 失去信仰
text: I used to pray every night. After my son got sick I stopped. What kind of God lets a six-year-old suffer? I miss believing but I can't go back to pretending everything happens for a reason.

name: 创意瓶颈
text: I haven't written a word in six months. I used to write every day. Now I just stare at the blank page and all I see is proof that I'm not as talented as I thought.

name: 极端内疚
text: I caused the accident. It was my fault. The other driver was in the hospital for weeks. They say it wasn't intentional but I was texting. I was texting and I almost killed someone.

name: 人群过敏
text: I had a panic attack at the grocery store. Just standing in line. I left my cart and drove home shaking. I'm 40 years old and I can't buy groceries. How did I get here?

name: 异乡人
text: I left my country because of the war. Sometimes at night I hear the sounds again. I have safety now but safety is not the same as home. I don't know if home even exists anymore.

name: 重新开始
text: I'm starting completely over at 50. New city, new career, no safety net. My friends think I'm having a breakdown but for the first time in decades I feel alive. Terrified, but alive.

name: 被误解的天才
text: I see patterns that nobody else sees. I've been called weird my whole life. The things I'm interested in — mathematics, philosophy, how systems work — nobody around me cares about. I'm not weird. I'm just... rare.

name: 性羞耻
text: I carry this secret shame about my desires. Nobody would understand. I'm not hurting anyone but I feel dirty. I wish I could just be normal. Whatever normal means.

name: 退伍军人
text: I came back from deployment two years ago. I'm physically fine but something broke inside me over there. I can't explain it to people who haven't been. They say thank you for your service and I want to scream.

name: 独居老人
text: I'm 78 and I live alone. My children call on Sundays. The rest of the week it's just me and the television. I used to be somebody. A teacher, a mother, a wife. Now I'm just old.

name: 双极症状
text: Last week I felt like I could conquer the world. This week I can barely get dressed. The swings are getting worse and I'm exhausted from never knowing which version of me will show up.

name: 逃避者
text: I have a pile of unopened mail. Bills, probably. I know I should deal with it but every time I reach for the pile my hand just... stops. It's easier to pretend it doesn't exist.

name: 被背叛者
text: I found out my business partner has been stealing from me for two years. Someone I trusted with everything. I don't know what hurts more — the money or the lie.

name: 寻找归属
text: I grew up in foster care. Seven homes in twelve years. I never learned what it feels like to belong somewhere permanently. Even now, with my own apartment, I keep a packed bag by the door.

name: 自然连接者
text: I went hiking alone last weekend and cried at the top of the mountain. Not from sadness. From relief. The trees don't care about my resume or my relationship status. They just let me breathe.

name: 过度负责
text: If anything goes wrong anywhere near me, I assume it's my fault. Even things I can't control. Someone's unhappy? Must be something I did. It's exhausting being the self-appointed fixer of everything.

name: 刚开始治疗
text: I finally went to a therapist. After years of saying I'm fine. The first thing she said was 'you don't have to be fine here' and I just broke. I didn't realize how much I needed someone to say that.
